calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-08-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, May 7, 2015 in Department 525:
GOLDEN WU CONSTRUCTION, INC. Respondent/Plaintiff appears by manager Sun Wu Liu with Cantonese translator Sam Yee. The clerk adminsters the interpreter's oath to Mr. Yee to translate the English language into the Cantonese language and vice versa.
Rosemary Tong, daughter appears for Appellant/Defendant Haylee Yee who is not present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and interpreter are sworn. Sun Wu Liu testifies on company's behalf through Contonese interpreter Sam Yee. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
EXHR (A) written report, diagram of building plant, list of fees, contract agreement, permit, etal.

Ms. Tong testifies on Haylee Yee's behalf. The following documentary evidence are introduced:
Exhibit 1 - written contract

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2015 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Continued To Feb-02-15 At 05:30 P.M. In Dept 506
